description: Style Note We hear of fashion policing all the time. Fragrance policing, not so much. That's because when it comes to fragrances, police takes care of all that with their range of innovative perfumes which flatter your sense of smell. Product Details Police Gold Wings is a spray perfume for women which comes in a suave black glass flask Caution Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying in eyes Size 100 ml
